name: skip-wait
description: Bypass countdown timers and skip waiting pages. Instant access on link shorteners and file hosts - no wait, one click. Works on any site with wait timers.

scripts.dev: VITE_DEV_WATCH=1 vite build --watch & sleep 2 && vite build --config vite.content.config.ts --watch
scripts.build: tsc -b && vite build && vite build --config vite.content.config.ts
